- Migrate SliderModel to @riverpod annotation
- Remove ChangeNotifier dependency from FireBaseAuthUC
- Update all imports and references to use new provider locations
- Generate .g.dart files for all migrated providers

Benefits:
- Modern Riverpod 2.0+ syntax with code generation
- Better type safety and IDE support
- Improved code organization with proper provider placement
